Uses of Class
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.RTC

Packages that use RTC
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource This package provides the base definitions for managing media processing resources. 
 

Uses of RTC in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup declared as RTC
static RTC MediaGroup.SIGDET_STOPPLAY
          The common RTC to stop a prompt when a DTMF is detected.
static RTC MediaGroup.SIGDET_STOPRECORD
          The common RTC to stop a recording when a DTMF is detected.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup with parameters of type RTC
 void Player.play(java.net.URI[] streamIDs, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Play the items in a play list sequentially (a composite prompt), identified by the streamIDs.
 void Player.play(java.net.URI streamID, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Play a single play item named by streamID.
 void Recorder.record(java.net.URI streamID, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Record data into the named container (usually a file, local or http), designated by a java.net.URI class.
 

Uses of RTC in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals with parameters of type RTC
 void SignalGenerator.emitSignals(java.lang.String signals, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Transmit a series of signals out the Terminal to the network.
 void SignalGenerator.emitSignals(Value[] signals, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Transmit a series of signals out the Terminal to the network.
 void SignalDetector.receiveSignals(int numSignals, Parameter[] patternLabels, RTC[] rtcs, Parameters optargs)
          Retrieves some signals from the signal buffer.
 

Uses of RTC in javax.media.mscontrol.resource
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.resource declared as RTC
static RTC[] RTC.NO_RTC
          A typed constant to use when no RTC is required:
myMediaGroup.play("my_file.wav, RTC.NO_RTC, myParameters);
